title: Add outreach_status field to job_postings with sent-draft auto-transition
userStory: As the user, I want each posting to carry an outreach status (awaiting / replied / no response) separate from its application response, so I can record whether my outreach got a reply.
acceptanceCriteria: A new sequential migration adds `outreach_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''` to job_postings; existing rows backfill to '' (none).
Migration applies cleanly against an existing DB with data (no data loss; outreach_count, last_outreach_at, response, contacts all preserved).
store.PostingTracking gains an OutreachStatus field; UpdatePostingTracking persists it.
Status is validated app-side to one of {'', 'awaiting', 'replied', 'no_response'}; an invalid value is rejected (returns an error, not silently stored).
MarkOutreachDraftSent (internal/store/outreach_drafts.go) sets outreach_status -> 'awaiting' in the same transaction, but does NOT clobber an existing 'replied' value.
outreach_status is independent of the `response` field: setting one does not mutate the other.
A store-level test confirms: default is '', mark-sent sets 'awaiting', mark-sent leaves 'replied' untouched, and invalid status is rejected.
